assumptionsNeedingHumanDecision: partner_brand applied to Goldin/Depop/TCGplayer/Tise/Caramel sub-products (goldin-marketplace, depop-payments, tcgplayer-direct, etc.) — these operate under partner brand identity, but human should confirm whether eBay wants to track them as partner_brand vs owned_marketing_name (e.g., if eBay begins co-branding sub-features).

cassini classified as internal_label (has brandTier t3, search algorithm internal to eBay, not surfaced as a customer-facing brand name) — human should confirm this is not being actively marketed to customers.

legal-tier t3 nodes left unclassified (ccpa-compliance, gdpr-compliance, copyright, trademark, eu-consumer-rights-directive, privacy-policy, terms-of-service, user-agreement) — these have brandTier t3 from the brand-tier pass but per naming-treatment rules are governance/legal nodes; human should decide if any should get descriptive_label treatment.

organization-tier authentication partners (beckett, certified-collectibles-group, sgc, sneaker-con) left unclassified — they are clearly partner_brand by definition but have tier=organization which the spec says to skip. Human governance decision needed on whether to classify organization-tier nodes as partner_brand.
terapeak left unclassified — has brandTier t2_name but status=renamed; human should confirm it should stay unclassified or get owned_marketing_name with a legacy note.
ebay-seller-capital left unclassified — has brandTier t2_name but tier=umbrella which is skipped per spec rules; human should review if this umbrella should be classified.
preloved-partner-program classified same as pre-loved-partner-program (both owned_marketing_name) — appears to be a variant/duplicate node; human should confirm deduplication plan.
secure-purchase is not in this registry — referenced in the spec as an anchor example but not present in enriched-consolidated-DEDUPLICATED.ts (1017 nodes). Human should confirm whether to add it.
